descriptionLevel1: Worry? You sleep like a rock. Zero issues.

descriptionLevel5: You worry about everything, including worrying too much.

descriptionLevel1: You and your cat have a very tight circle.

descriptionLevel1: Daydreaming? Reality is more than enough for you.
descriptionLevel3: You get creative sparks once in a while.
descriptionLevel5: You can turn a boring errand into a whole movie in your head.

descriptionLevel1: Trust is earned. Slowly. With receipts.

descriptionLevel1: Great at starting, not so great at finishing.

descriptionLevel5: You finish tasks properly and often ahead of time.

descriptionLevel1: You’re basically zen. Almost nothing bothers you.

descriptionLevel1: Big parties? Hard pass. Home is better.

descriptionLevel4: You like the energy of big parties.

descriptionLevel2: You take charge only when someone has to.
